seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The letter "e" must appear at least 50 times throughout the email.
new_constraint: The letter "e" must appear at most 40 times throughout the email.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The letter "e" must appear at least 50 times throughout the email. The letter "e" must appear at most 40 times throughout the email.
response: I cannot fulfill this request because it contains a logical contradiction. You have asked me to write an email where the letter "e" appears at least 50 times, but also at most 40 times. It is mathematically impossible for a count to be both greater than 50 and less than 40 simultaneously.<turn|>
